Ascend C cumsum_reverse kernel implementation
API: Exp Log
AscendC example implementing 1D inclusive scan (cumsum) with reverse order along a specified dimension, including host tiling, operator registration, and PyTorch binding.

Ascend C cumsum_reverse kernel implementation
API: Exp Log
AscendC AICore kernel example for an inclusive prefix-sum (cumsum) along a specified axis with reverse order, including project JSON, host tiling, op registry, kernel implementation, PyTorch binding, and a model replacement template.
